rationale: Interprocedural check: `if (validate_outparam(&p) < 0) return;` — pattern uses `&p` (addr-of) not bare `p`. Current guard regex requires bare identifier; doesn't catch this. Documents axis-3 known limit: out-param checks aren't recognized. Verdict will WRONGLY emit EXPLOITABLE → disagrees; fixture records the FP-leak shape for future fixing.
